name: Cheese Eyeballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cheese and butter in a bowl. Stir in the salt, paprika, and flour until well mixed.
2. Measure approximately one tablespoon of the mixture and form an "eyeball" around an olive.
3. Turn the olive so that it is "staring" outward.
4. Place the eyeballs on an ungreased cookie sheet lined with parchment paper or foil.
5. Bake in a preheated 400°F (200°C) oven for 15 minutes.
